'''Mica''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Fregan]] and cousin of [[Lena Cobral]]. Though they were close, Mica tried to stop Lena from testifying against the [[Cobral family]], although [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] stopped her plans. Mica tried to redeem herself by shadowing Lena during a meeting with the rest of the Cobral family, but she was sniffed out and killed by [[Bard Cobral]].
